---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for A.L.I.C.E.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. I always find it annoying when [...]

**Describe the solution you would like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you have considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

**Which agent(s) would this affect?**
[e.g. Olivia (orchestrator), Dylan (development), all agents]

**Additional context**
Any mockups, examples, or links that help explain your request.
